name: Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 5%
about: Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 5% is a general medicine that is used for treating hair loss and promoting hair growth in men and women. This medicine is manufactured in India, and it comes in a solid dosage form. The recommended dosage of this medicine is as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. This medicine needs to be kept in a dry place for optimal storage.

faq.a: Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 5% is used for treating hair loss and promoting hair growth in men and women.

faq.a: This medicine should be stored in a dry place for optimal storage.
